creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matthias Fechner from comment #1)
After commit "security update to 15.1.2" (https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/www/gitlab-ce?id=61e677748877875d05008c1a76111e6fef95c39f) of course yes.

But I can try one more time.

BTW, yesterday I removed and reinstalled all gems (558), but it didn't help:
pkg delete -yfg 'rubygem-*' && portmaster gitaly gitlab-ce
